snippet.title: ALPHA | Official Trailer | Alia, Sharvari, Anil, Bobby, Shiv Rawail | YRF Spy Universe | 3 July 2026
snippet.description:
You saw the FIRST KILL. Now get ready to witness THE HUNT. Presenting the Official Trailer of “ALPHA”

Welcome to the newest chapter of the YRF Spy Universe that presents an edgy origin story of a girl raised and built to kill. Alpha is a female-led action film that will take you on a fun, edge of the seat, thrilling ride that is designed as an out and out entertainer.

Yash Raj Films presents Alpha, starring Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, and Bobby Deol. Produced by Aditya Chopra and directed by Shiv Rawail, acclaimed for the globally celebrated series The Railway Men, Alpha is set to release in theatres worldwide on July 3, 2026.

► Subscribe Now: https://goo.gl/xs3mrY 🔔 Stay updated!
► YRF New Releases: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLCB05E03DA939D484

🎬 Movie Credits:
Movie: Alpha
Starring: Alia Bhatt, Sharvari, Anil Kapoor, Bobby Deol
Director: Shiv Rawail
Producer: Aditya Chopra
Co-Producer: Akshaye Widhani
Screenplay: Soumil Shukla, Shridhar Raghavan
Director of Photography: Rubais
Music: Rohansh & Abeer 
Lyrics: Kumaar, Anvitaa Dutt, Kausar Munir, Rohansh & Abeer
Dialogues: Ishita Moitra
Story: Uday Chopra
Associate Producer: Rishabh Chopra
Executive Producer: Padam Bhushan
Editor: Aarif Sheikh
Production Designers: Subrata Chakraborty, Amit Ray
Action Directors: Craig Macrae, Sunil Rodrigues (ROD)
Sound: Ganesh Gangadharan, Debasish Mishra
Background Music: Sanchit Balhara, Ankit Balhara
Costume Designers: Aki Narula, Natasha Vohra, Deepali Singh Raseen, Gunpreet Kaur Mann 
Director of Choreography: Vijay Ganguly, Bosco Leslie Martis
Visual Effects Studio: yFX
Casting Director: Shanoo Sharma
Trailers & Promos: Mohit Sajnaney

Trailer Mixed & Mastered by: Abhishek Khandelwal (YRF Studios), Dileep Nair (Assistant Engineer - YRF Studios)
Trailer Background Music: Jamaican (Bam Bam)
Artist: HUGEL & SOLTO (FR)
Master: MoBlack Records
Publishers: Westbury Music Ltd., Prophesy Music Publishing and Abood Music Ltd.
Music Recreated by: Rohansh & Abeer

Release Date: 3rd July 2026

Stay in the filmy loop:
► Like us on Facebook: Facebook/yrf
► Follow us on X: x.com/yrf
► Follow us on Instagram: Instagram/yrf
► Visit us on: yashrajfilms.com

About YRF Spy Universe:
YRF Spy Universe is a first of its kind cinematic universe of spy thriller films in India. The first film in the universe, "Ek Tha Tiger", starring Salman Khan and Katrina Kaif was released in 2012, followed by its sequel "Tiger Zinda Hai" in 2017. The third film in the universe, "War" was released in 2019 and starred Hrithik Roshan and Tiger Shroff in pivotal roles. "Pathaan" was the fourth instalment in the Spy Universe franchise which was released in 2023 starring Shah Rukh Khan, Deepika Padukone and John Abraham. "Tiger 3", the fifth instalment in the YRF Spy Universe and the third film in the Tiger series, starring Salman Khan, Katrina Kaif and Emraan Hashmi, released in 2023. "War 2", the sixth film in the YRF Spy Universe, starring Hrithik Roshan, NTR and Kiara Advani, directed by Ayan Mukerji, released on 14 August 2025. "Alpha", the seventh film in the franchise and Hindi cinema’s first female-led YRF Spy Universe film, starring Alia Bhatt and Sharvari, will release on 3 July 2026.

© Yash Raj Films Pvt. Ltd.

snippet.title: [HINDI] BMPS 2026 | GRAND FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE
snippet.description:
Download BGMI now: https://bgmi.go.link/2w5kg

This is it! The final day of the BMPS 2026 Grand Finals.

After an incredible journey through every stage of the tournament, it all comes down to one last day. Every elimination, every placement point, and every Chicken Dinner could decide who will be crowned the BMPS 2026 Champions.

Sixteen teams entered the Grand Finals, but only one will lift the trophy and etch their name into BMPS history.

💰 Total Prize Pool: ₹4Cr

Map Rotation

Match ⚔️2 : Erangel

Nagabandham is an 2026 Upcoming Pan India Movie Starring Virat Karrna, Nabha Natesh, Ishwarya Menon, Mahesh Manjrekar, Jagapathi Babu & others. Story, Screenplay & Direction by Abhishek Nama. snippet.description:
Ishq X Barbaad Mashup | AMEET Mashup | Jubin Nautiyal x Arijit Singh | Faheem Abdullah | Ishq Mashup

Don't Re-Upload My Videos You Will Get Copyright Strike Right Away!
Don't Re-Upload My Videos You Will Get Copyright Strike Right Away!

Mashup By : AMEET Mashup
Thumbnail  : AMEET Mashup
Video Edit   : AMEET Mashup

❤️ Ishq X Barbaad Mashup ❤️

Experience a soul-stirring musical journey where the timeless emotions of love, longing, and heartbreak come together in one unforgettable mashup. "Ishq X Barbaad Mashup" beautifully blends the soothing melodies of Ishq with the heartfelt pain of Barbaad, creating a perfect soundtrack for every romantic soul.

🎵 Featuring the magical voices and musical essence of:
• Faheem Abdullah – Ishq
• Jubin Nautiyal – Barbaad
• Arijit Singh – Romantic Classics Inspiration

This mashup is crafted with smooth transitions, emotional vocals, and cinematic vibes that will take you through the highs and lows of love. Whether you're in love, missing someone special, or simply enjoying soulful music, this mashup is made for you.

✨ Presented by AMEET Mashup
🎧 Use headphones for the best experience.

snippet.title: Pattampoochi Lyric Video | Vishwanath and Sons | Suriya, Mamitha Baiju | G.V. Prakash | Venky Atluri
snippet.description:
Watch & Enjoy #Pattampoochi Lyrical Video from the Latest Tamil Movie #VishwanathandSons on Aditya Music Tamil.

#Suriya #MamithaBaiju #GVPrakash #VenkyAtluri 

A Heartfelt journey of Dreams, Emotions, and Unexpected Love unfolds. ❤️
Step into the World of Sanjay Vishwanath. 😎
Get Ready for the Biggest Family Entertainer of 2026, Arriving in Cinemas this August! 🤩🎉

Vishwanath & Sons is an upcoming Tamil-Telugu film, starring Suriya, Mamitha Baiju, Radhika Sarathkumar, and Raveena Tandon in pivotal roles. Directed by Venky Atluri, the film is produced by Suryadevara Naga Vamsi and Sai Soujanya under Sithara Entertainments and Fortune Four Cinemas, and presented by Srikara Studios.

Featuring music by G. V. Prakash Kumar, cinematography by Nimish Ravi, editing by Navin Nooli, and production design by Banglan.


Song: Pattampoochi
Music by G V Prakash Kumar
Singer: Sublahshini
Lyricist: Arunraja Kamaraj
Choreographer: Vijay binni
Programmed by Smith Asher
Veena: Haritha
Trumpets: Maxwell and babu
Acoustic Guitar, Nylon Guitar, Electric Guitar: Sandeep Mohan
Female Chorus: Aavani Malhar, Jerina Anna, Kaanjana Sreeram, Aruna Mary George
Vocal Supervision: S.P. Abhishek
Recorded by Aswin George John at Sounds Right Studios
Chorus Recorded by Sanjai Arakkal at Audiogene Sound Studios
Music Supervised by Jehovahson Alghar
Pre-Mixed by Roopash Tiwari 
Mixed and Mastered by Jehovahson Alghar, 
Divine labs 
Assistant Sound Engineer : Roopash Tiwari, Divine labs 
Divine labs Musicians Assistant : P Rajamurugan

Suriya, Mamitha Baiju, Kalaiarasi Radikaa Sarathkumar, Raveena Tandon, Nassar, Sudha, Raghu Babu, Sunil Reddy, Bhavani Sri, Viva Harsha, Kaali Venkat, George Maryan, Hyper Aadhi, Srija Ravi, Sarvadaman Banerjee, Mathew Varghese, Kalyani Natarajan, Karate Karthik, Master Charvik

उदित नारायण की मखमली आवाज़ में 'फूल फूल पे बनी है' एक ऐसा नगमा है जो नब्बे के दशक की यादें ताज़ा कर देता है। यह गीत प्यार और रोमांस की एक अनोखी दास्तान है।



Credits :

Song: Phool Phool Pe Bani Hai
Album: Phool
Artist: Udit Narayan
Music Director: Anand-Milind
Lyricist: Anand Bakshi 



Lyrics :

Baharo ki maangi huyi ek dua
Hazaro ki maangi huyi iltja
Hazaro baras mein kabhi ho kabul
To khilta hai tumsa hansi ek phool


Phool phool pe bani teri tasveer
Phool phool pe bani teri tasveer
Phool phool pe likha hai tera naam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam

Tujhe salam ho tujhe salam

Is duniya ki chij nahi tu
Ek chand ka tukda hai

Dil kash tera mukhda hai
Is duniya ki chij nahi tu
Ek chand ka tukda hai
Main to insan phariste bhi
Main to insan phariste bhi


Teri kasam ban jaye tere gulam
Ho tujhe salam tujhe salam
Ho phool phool pe bani meri tasveer
Phool phool pe bani meri tasveer
Phool phool pe likha hai mera naam
Tujhe salam ho tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam
Tujhe salam ho tujhe salam
Tujhe salam tujhe salam.

इस सदाबहार गीत को सुनकर आपका मन सुकून से भर जाएगा। अगर आपको यह गाना पसंद आया, तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक करें, कमेंट में अपना पसंदीदा गाना बताएं और हमारे चैनल को सब्सक्राइब करें।

Let the magic of music live on…

snippet.title: Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai | Udit Narayan | Alka Yagnik | Andaaz (2003)
snippet.description:
Fall in love with the timeless melody "Aaj Kehna Zaroori Hai" from the blockbuster movie. Beautifully sung by Udit Narayan and Alka Yagnik, this romantic duet captures the joy of expressing love and emotions from the heart.

Featuring Akshay Kumar and Lara Dutta, the song remains one of the most loved romantic tracks from the golden era of Bollywood music.

snippet.title: Bandhu 2.0 | Shahid, Kriti, Rashmika| Pritam | Kavita | Neeraj | Irshad K | Cocktail 2 | 19th June
snippet.description:
Tumhi din chadhe, tumhi din dhale,
Tumhi ho bandhu, sakha tumhi! 💃

Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon and Rashmika Mandanna are back with ‘Bandhu 2.0’ from ‘Cocktail 2’! Composed by Pritam, penned by Irshad Kamil and sung by Kavita Seth and Neeraj Shridhar, get ready to get back in time and groove with it!

#Bandhu2.0 #Cocktail2 #ShahidKapoor #KritiSanon #RashmikaMandanna 

🎧 Song Credits 
Featuring: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon & Rashmika Mandanna 
Directed by : Amar Kaushik
Singer: Kavita Sheth and Neeraj Shridhar
Music Composer: Pritam Chakraborty 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Mixed and Mastered by - Eric Pillai at Future Sound of Bombay
Assistant to Eric Pillai - Michael Edwin Pillai

#Cocktail2, releasing in cinemas on 19th June 2026

🎬 Video Credits
Cast: Shahid Kapoor, Kriti Sanon, Rashmika Mandanna
Directed By: Homi Adajania 
Produced By: Dinesh Vijan, Luv Ranjan, Pramita R Vijan and Ankur Garg 
Written By: Tarun Jain and Luv Ranjan
Co-Producers: Sharada Karki Jalota, Pooja Prem Patheja
Director of Photography: Santhana Krishnan Ravichandran
Original Song and Background Score: Pritam Chakraborty   
Costume Designer: Anaita Shroff Adajania 
Director of Choreography: Jaani Master
Publicity Design: Himanshu & Rahul Nanda (H-one)

Lyrics:
Yaara tere sadke
Ishq sikha main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Main toh yaara tere sadke
Main toh aayi jag tajh ke
Ishq sikha
Jab yaar kare parwah meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Jag mujhpe lagaaye pabandhi
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Everytime every minute of the day
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Dil ki takhti par hoon likhti
Ishqan ishqan
Jag kya jaane dil ko mere
Ishqan kiska
Rabb yaar gale le saar meri
Mujhe kya parwah iss duniya ki
Tu jeet meri jag haar meri
Main hoon hi nahi iss duniya ki
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Tumhi din chadhe
Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi
Nahi Hosh Tu Mujhe Thaamle
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

Tumhi din dhale
Tumhi ho bandhu
Sakha tumhi

snippet.title: 🔴 [HI] GRAND FINALS - CHAMPION RUSH | FFMAI 2026 SUMMER
snippet.description:
THE GRAND FINALS OF FFMAI 2026 SUMMER IS HERE!
After a gruelling Main Event stage, 12 teams have qualified for the GRAND FINALS, which will be played in CHAMPION RUSH format!

The Top 12 finalists-
♦ Revenant XSpark
♦ Team Apex Gaming
♦ S8UL Esports
♦ All Gamers Global
♦ Team Falcons
♦ RRQ Kazu
♦ Bigetron By Vitality
♦ Aurora Gaming
♦ Hotshot Esports
♦ Titan Esports Club
♦ Straw Hats
♦ DEMONS PRIDE

Champion Rush format-
Any team that reaches 90 points will activate Champion Rush.
The team to win a Booyah! after activating Champion Rush will be crowned CHAMPIONS!

Schedule 📋
📅 Grand Finals - June 21

Are you ready to witness the champion, who will be CROWNED BY FIRE!

#FFMAI2026 #FFM #crownedbyfire 

[FFM, FFESPORTS, FFINDIA, FFMAI, FFMAI2026, FFMIC, Free Fire, Free Fire Max, Free Fire Max India, Free Fire Max Esports]

দাবিত্যাগ: - এই চ্যানেল কোনো অবৈধ কার্যকলাপকে প্রচার বা উৎসাহিত করে না। এই চ্যানেলের সমস্ত বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক এবং তথ্যমূলক উদ্দেশ্যে তৈরি। 

কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ: - কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (FAIR USE) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার, যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহার ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের পক্ষে ভারসাম্য রক্ষা করে।

চ্যানেল ডিসক্লেইমার – কমিকভার্স হলো একটি পপ কালচার কমেন্টারি ও ফিল্ম রিভিউ চ্যানেল, যা ফ্যান থিওরি, ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ এবং ট্রেলার রিভিউয়ের জন্য উৎসর্গীকৃত। কমিকভার্স চ্যানেল মাঝে মাঝে ফিল্ম, ওয়েব সিরিজ, ট্রেলার এবং গান সম্পর্কে ব্যাখ্যা করার জন্য ফিল্ম ক্লিপ, টিভি সিরিজ ক্লিপ, ওয়েব সিরিজ ক্লিপ, অ্যানিমেশন সিরিজ ক্লিপ ব্যবহার করে থাকে, কিন্তু কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের (ফেয়ার ইউজ) অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়।

bn.title: GODLIKE-এর দুর্দান্ত প্রত্যাবর্তন! 👑 | APEX GAMING দুরন্ত ফর্মে 🔥
bn.description:
📷 ইনস্টাগ্রাম - https://www.instagram.com/mrspike10/

ডিসকর্ডে আমাকে অনুসরণ করুন 👇
https://discord.com/invite/2pejjUbCKj

▶️ দ্বিতীয় চ্যানেল - https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCasVrVp-Lr0ynmxFeXRG3oQ

📧mrspikeinquiry@gmail.com

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

✅কপিরাইট আইন ১৯৭৬-এর ১০৭ ধারা অনুযায়ী কপিরাইট দাবিত্যাগ, সমালোচনা, মন্তব্য, সংবাদ প্রতিবেদন, শিক্ষাদান, বৃত্তি এবং গবেষণার মতো উদ্দেশ্যে "ন্যায্য ব্যবহারের" অনুমতি দেওয়া হয়েছে। ন্যায্য ব্যবহার হলো কপিরাইট আইন দ্বারা অনুমোদিত একটি ব্যবহার যা অন্যথায় লঙ্ঘনকারী হতে পারে। অলাভজনক, শিক্ষামূলক বা ব্যক্তিগত ব্যবহারের ক্ষেত্রে ফেয়ার ইউজের (ন্যায্য ব্যবহার) পাল্লা ভারী থাকে।

✅ভিডিও গেম ডিসক্লেইমার: এই ভিডিওর বিষয়বস্তু শুধুমাত্র শিক্ষামূলক ব্যবহারের জন্য। গেমপ্লেটি হলো Battlegrounds Mobile India (BGMI) নামক একটি ভিডিও গেম এবং এটি একটি কাল্পনিক সৃষ্টি।

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖
✅যারা আমার ভিডিও দেখেন, লাইক, শেয়ার এবং কমেন্ট করেন, তাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ। আপনাদের কাছে এটি হয়তো একটি ছোট বিষয় মনে হতে পারে, কিন্তু আমি আপনাদের প্রত্যেককে আন্তরিকভাবে ধন্যবাদ জানাই। আপনাদের দেওয়া সমস্ত মতামত এবং মন্তব্যই আমাদের চ্যানেলকে আজকের এই পর্যায়ে নিয়ে আসতে সাহায্য করেছে।
তাই আবারও, আপনাদের সবাইকে অসংখ্য ধন্যবাদ!!! 😍

➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖

pa.description:

#From #FromSeason4 #FromSeason4Episode10 #fromseason4trailer #Fromseason4fulltrailer #fromseason4trailerbreakdown #fromseason3 #Fromily #fromville #fromonmgm #fromtvseries #fromtvshow #fromseason4Episode10trailer #mgm #mgmplus #fromexplained #FromTrailer #FromEndingExplained #talisman #FromMonsters #FromSeason4Filming #themaninyellow #smiley #HaroldPerrineau #fromseason4teaser #storywalking #Anghkooey

https://press.amazonmgmstudios.com/us/en/mgm-plus-series/from/4

ਜੇਰੇਮੀ ਆਈਸ ਐਂਡ ਫਾਇਰ 33 ਵਿੱਚ ਤੁਹਾਡਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ ਜਿੱਥੇ ਅਸੀਂ ਹਾਊਸ ਆਫ਼ ਦ ਡਰੈਗਨ, 28 ਸਾਲ ਬਾਅਦ, ਸੇਵਰੈਂਸ, FROM, ਤੋਂ ਹਿੱਟ ਟੀਵੀ ਸੀਰੀਜ਼ ਅਤੇ ਫਿਲਮਾਂ ਦੀ ਇੱਕ ਵਿਸ਼ਾਲ ਸ਼੍ਰੇਣੀ ਨੂੰ ਕਵਰ ਕਰਦੇ ਹਾਂ। ਸ਼ੋਗੁਨ ਅਤੇ ਹੋਰ! ਲਾਈਵ ਵਾਚ ਪਾਰਟੀਆਂ ਅਤੇ ਚੈਨਲ ਅੱਪਡੇਟ ਲਈ ਸਾਡੇ ਡਿਸਕਾਰਡ ਵਿੱਚ ਸ਼ਾਮਲ ਹੋਵੋ, ਸਾਰਿਆਂ ਦਾ ਸਵਾਗਤ ਹੈ! 🧙🏻‍♂️

Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: Nagan Si Lugai Tera Balam Chota (Official Video) Farmani Naaz | New haryanvi Song | Hema| Naaz Music
snippet.description:
#NaganSiLugai #farmaninaaz i #terabalamchota #Naazmusic 

Song  - Nagan Si Lugai | नागन सी लुगाई 
Artist   -  Hema Chaudhary.Rahul Mulheda , Varunesh Baisla
Lyrics  - varunesh baisla , Anuj Mulheda 
Music - Gaurav Panchal (Gr Music -8708626865)
Singer - Farmani Naaz , Manish Tyagi 
Video Shoot - Panchal Productions
Director -  Rahul Mulheda , Nitin Panchal 
Editor - Nitin Panchal 
Publicity Design - Rahul mulheda
Publisher - Naaz Music
Label -   Naaz Music
Production - Rahul Mulheda
Special Thanks - Naaz Music And Team
For any query:- Email - farmaninaaz786@gmail.com

                 Lyrics
Mhare khat khatoli ka na tota
ra mahre khat khatoli ka na tota

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Lakh lakh ke shut ma phru
Sava lakh ki jutti re

Chandi ka mera vir al nada
Delhi ke ma kotti re

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

Up ke ma dunga maru halle delhi sari ri
Dur dur ta nigah gadave rande cheel juhari ri

Love you bhabhi

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 

do balka ki ma bngi ma lagu kati kavari si 
Dhunge mere jholl marre

Chotti nag bnari ri
Bin hi bja du kya

tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri 
tu to nagan si lugai tera balam chotta ri


म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा
र म्हारे खाट खटोली का ना टोटा 

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

लाख लाख के सूट मै पहरू सवा लाख की जूती रे
चांदी का मेरा वायरल नाड़ा दिल्ली के मै कोठी र

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

यूपी के मै ढुंगा मारू हाले दिल्ली सारी री
दूर दूर त निगाह गड़ावे रांडे छेल जुहारी री
लव यू भाभी

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 

दो बालका की मां बनगी मै लागू कती कवारी सी
ढुंगे मेरे झोल मार र चोटी नाग बनारी री
बीन ही बजा दू क्या

तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री 
तू तो नागन सी लुगाई तेरा बालम छोटा री

This Haryanvi Song Sung by rahul mulheda. Music given manish tyagi. Penned by Ravi Rangi. Copyright & Music label by NAAZ MUSIC

snippet.title: Franklin & Shinchan Turn Their House Into A Dairy Milk Mansion In GTA 5! | GTA 5 Bangla Gameplay

GTA 5: Franklin & Shinchan Turn Their House Into A Dairy Milk Mansion! 🍫🏠😱 | GTA 5 Bangla Gameplay
#tsunami #shinchan #shinchangta5

In this GTA 5 Bangla episode, Franklin and Shinchan transform their normal house into a giant Dairy Milk chocolate mansion! From chocolate walls and candy decorations to sweet surprises everywhere, this becomes the sweetest house in Los Santos.

🍫 Dairy Milk Mansion | GTA 5 Bangla Story | Chocolate House | Fun Transformation

Featuring full Bangla voiceover and cinematic editing, this episode delivers fun moments, creative house upgrades, and amazing chocolate-themed adventures.

💬 Would you live inside a giant Dairy Milk mansion?

snippet.title: Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर | Shiv Stuti | Remove Negativity | Powerful Shiv Mantra
snippet.description:
◆Song : Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar
◆Singer : Kamlesh Mishra, Deepak Rana
◆Music : Ankur Kapoor
◆Lyrics : Traditional
◆Label  : Digiline Records

 @DigilineRecords 

Welcome to Digiline Records..!! for premium Bhakti Songs on YouTube..
India is a land of multiple faiths and religions but one spirit. Being spiritual is getting connected to the universe, communicating and listening to it. India offers more than thousands of religious songs, bhakti geets, bhajans to choose from the library of our music label “Digiline Records”. also has daily updates, new additions dedicated to Gods, Goddesses & Deities. Informative and soothing catalogue of divine dharmik energy.

📌 If you like this video, please Like 👍
📌 Share it with your family and friends
📌 Subscribe to our channel for more devotional and spiritual content

Thank you for your love and support 💙
🙏 Stay blessed, stay spiritual 🙏

शिव स्तुति: आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर (Shiv Stuti: Ashutosh Shashank Shekhar)
आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर,
चन्द्र मौली चिदंबरा,
कोटि कोटि प्रणाम शम्भू,
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा ॥
निर्विकार ओमकार अविनाशी,
तुम्ही देवाधि देव
जगत सर्जक प्रलय करता,
शिवम सत्यम सुंदरा ॥

निरंकार स्वरूप कालेश्वर,
महा योगीश्वरा,
दयानिधि दानिश्वर जय,
जटाधार अभयंकरा ॥

शूल पानी त्रिशूल धारी,
औगड़ी बाघम्बरी,
जय महेश त्रिलोचनाय,
विश्वनाथ विशम्भरा ॥

नाथ नागेश्वर हरो हर,
पाप साप अभिशाप तम,
महादेव महान भोले,
सदा शिव शिव संकरा ॥

जगत पति अनुरकती भक्ति,
सदैव तेरे चरण हो,
क्षमा हो अपराध सब,
जय जयति जगदीश्वरा ॥

जनम जीवन जगत का,
संताप ताप मिटे सभी,
ओम नमः शिवाय मन,
जपता रहे पञ्चाक्षरा ॥

आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर,
चन्द्र मौली चिदंबरा,
कोटि कोटि प्रणाम शम्भू,
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा ॥
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..

श्री शिव पंचाक्षर स्तोत्र | शिव चालीसा | आरती: श्री शिव, शंकर, भोलेनाथ
#mahadev #shivbhakt #shivastotra #shivastuti #ashutoshshashankshekhar #bhajan #song #bhajan #mantra #shivamantra #shivamantrachanting,
Ancient Mantra Of Lord Shiva 
Powerful mantra of lord shiva

जय महेश त्रिलोचनाय,
विश्वनाथ विशम्भरा ॥

नाथ नागेश्वर हरो हर,
पाप साप अभिशाप तम,
महादेव महान भोले,
सदा शिव शिव संकरा ॥

जगत पति अनुरकती भक्ति,
सदैव तेरे चरण हो,
क्षमा हो अपराध सब,
जय जयति जगदीश्वरा ॥

जनम जीवन जगत का,
संताप ताप मिटे सभी,
ओम नमः शिवाय मन,
जपता रहे पञ्चाक्षरा ॥

आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर,
चन्द्र मौली चिदंबरा,
कोटि कोटि प्रणाम शम्भू,
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा ॥
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..
कोटि नमन दिगम्बरा..

snippet.title: Aan Takalya Bhang Padu | आण टकल्या भांग पाडू | Kiran Vartha | RK King
snippet.description:
Aan Taklya Bhang Padu  Kes nay t Kay Karu | आण टकल्या भांग पाडू |

◻️Producer- Rohit Khutade (RK King)

◻️Audio Credit-
◼️Lyrics- Kiran Vartha
◼️Singer- Kiran Vartha, Diksha 
◼️Music/Mixmaster- Rk King

◻️Video Credit- 
◼️Story Direction- Ashish Ganeshkar
◼️Starring- Kiran Vartha, Rutu Warghare
Vishnu Kurhade, JJ, Mahindra Basvat
◼️Videography/Editing/Poster- Ashish Ganeshkar

Dancers: Creators Brothers; Manish kambera 
Mayur kambera 
Shalaka khandagale 
Mayuri patade

◻️Thanks-
◼️Pakya Singer. Vishanu Kurhade. 


सदर गीत फक्त मनोरंजन हेतूने बघावे. त्याचा कोणत्या व्यक्ती शी काही वयक्तिक संबंध नाही. कोणाच्या भावना दुखावणे हा आमचा हेतू नाही. करमणूक आणि हास्य या आधारित हे गावातील गीत  बालपणतील एक गावठी बडबड गीताला अवसरून आहे. तरी आपणास विनंती आहे फक्त मनोरंजन हेतूने पाहावे. वयक्तिक रूपात आम्ही सर्व लोकांचे मनापासून आदर करतो.  धन्यवाद! !

#gavthisong #rkking #kiranvarthanewsong #marathisong #

© RK Record's

snippet.title: Mudd Muddu Putlakshmi | Ayogya 2 Video Song | Sathish Ninasam | Rachita Ram | S Mahesh Kumar | AJ
snippet.description:
"The magic of the Yenammi pair is back! 🕺💃 Another melody, another blockbuster, same unmatched chemistry. ✨"
Arjun Janya strikes gold once again! The soundtrack for Ayogya - 2 is an absolute vibe. 🎵🔥
Presenting The Ayogya -2 First Single "Mudd Muddu Putlakshmi" ✨ Video Song
From The Movie : Ayogya -2  Starring : Sathish Ninasam, Rachita Ram & Others 
Exclusive Only On Anand Audio Official Youtube Channel..!!!
_______________________ 
#ayogya2 #MuddMudduPutlakshmi #sathishninasam #rachitaram #sidsriram #prithwibhat #chethankumar #smaheshkumar #arjunjanya #kannadanewsong  #anandaudio #svcfilms #mmunegowda  
______________________
To Listen On Your Favourite Music Streaming Platform
♪ Insta Reels : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/1726065358807762/   
♪ Youtube Shorts : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=l62U31AWXLc  
♪ Youtube Music : https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=l62U31AWXLc  
♪ Spotify : https://open.spotify.com/track/0uc6L16PhCad1SlwHTdolj 
♪ Jiosaavn : https://www.jiosaavn.com/song/muddu-muddu-putlakshmi-from-ayogya-2/RDIBayBbaHQ 
♪ Gaana : https://gaana.com/song/mudd-muddu-putlakshmi  
♪ Amazon Prime Music : https://music.amazon.in/tracks/B0H5VQT899  
♪ Apple Music : https://music.apple.com/us/song/mudd-muddu-putlakshmi-from-ayogya-2/6781960571  
--------------------------
Lyrics : 
ಮುದ್ದು ಮುದ್ದು ಪುಟ್ಟಲಕ್ಷ್ಮಿ
ಕದ್ ಕದ್ದು ನನ್ನನ್ನೇ 
ಮೆಲ್ಮೆಲ್ಗೆ ಯಾಕೋ ನೋಡ್ತಾವ್ಳೆ
ಮುದ್ದು ಮುದ್ದು    ರಂಗಯ್ಯ
ಪಳ್ ಪಳನೆ  ಹೊಳ್ಕೊಂಡು 
ಬಿರ್ಬಿರ್ನೇ ಕನಸಾಗೇ   ಬತ್ತಾವ್ನೆ
m:- ಸಿಡಿಸಿಡ ಕೋಪನೇ ಸಿಂಗಾರ
ಇವಳ ಬಡ ಬಡ ಮಾತೆಲ್ಲ ಬಂಗಾರ
f.m :- ಸುಮ್ಸುಮ್ನೆ ಇದ್ರೂನೂ ಅರಸಾನೇ ನಂಗೆ  
ಬುಳ್  ಬುಳನೆ    ನಕ್ಕುಬುಟ್ರೆ ಚಂದಿರ
m:- ಬಾರಿ ವೈನಾಗವ್ಳೆ ಮಾತಲ್  ಮುತ್ತಿಡುತ್ತಾಳೆ
f.m :- ಭಾರಿ ವೈನಾಗವ್ನೆ ಕಣ್ಣಲ್ ಮುದ್ದಾಡ್ತಾನೆ

ಚರಣ:-1
m :- ರೇಷ್ಮೆ ಉಟ್ಕೊಂಡು  ಜಡೆಯ ಹೆಣ್ಕೊಂಡು
 ಮಲ್ಲಿಗೆ ಮುಡ್ಕೊಂಡು  ಹತ್ರ   ಕುಂತ್ಬುಟ್ರೆ
 ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
f.m :- ನುಗ್ಗೋ ಗೂಳಿಯ
 ಜಗ್ಗಿ ಎಳ್ಕೊಂಡು  ಹಿಗ್ಗಿ ಬರ್ತಿದ್ರೆ
 ಹಬ್ಬ ನೋಡ್ದಂಗೆ  ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
 ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
m:-  ಬುಡುಬುಡುಕೆ ಹಾಲಕ್ಕಿ ನುಡಿದವನೇ
ನೀನೇನೆ  ನನ್ ಹೆಂಡ್ರು  ಅಂದವನೇ
f.m :-  ಮಂಟೇ ಸಿದ್ದಪ್ಪಾಜಿ ಮಾದೇವ ನಾಣೆ
ಈ ಜೀವ  ಯಾವತ್ತಿಗೂ  ನಿಂದೇನೆ
m :- ಬಾರಿ ವೈನಾಗವ್ಳೆ 
ಕಿವಿಯಲ್  ಪಿಸ್ ಗೂಡ್ತಾಳೆ
f. m:-  ಬಾರಿ ವೈನಾಗವ್ನೆ
ಭಾರಿ ಗಮ್ಮಂತಾನೆ
BGM:- ಮಕ್ಕಳ ಕೋರಸ್
ಕಬ್ಬನ್ಗದ್ದೆ ,ರಾಗಿ ಸಾಲು ಬಾಳೆ ಮಂಡಿ ,ಆಲೆಮನೆ
ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೋಡಿ ನೋಡೋದಕ್ಕೆ ಕಾಯ್ತ ಅವೇ
ಜೋಡಿ ಎತ್ತು, ಹಾಡು ಮೇಕೆ, ಕೋಳಿ ಹುಂಜ , ಹಕ್ಕಿಸಾಲು 
ನೂರು ಕಾಲ  ಬಾಳಿ ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ತಾ ಅವೇ

 ಚರಣ:-2
f.m :- ಗತ್ತು ದೊರೆಯಂಗೆ ಮಾತು ಮುತ್ತಂಗೆ
ಮತ್ತು ಏರಿದಂಗೆ ಎದೆಯಲ್ ಇಳಿದಂಗೆ
ಶಿವ ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
m :- ನಕ್ರೆ ಸಂಕ್ರಾಂತಿ  ಸಿಕ್ರೆ   ಉಗಾದಿ
 ನೋಟ ಪಟಾಕಿ  ಚಂದ ದಸರಾ ನೇ
 ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
f.m :-  ಒಂಚೂರು ತಾಕುದ್ರು ಸಾಹುಕಾರ
ಎದೆ ಬಡಿತ ಆಯ್ತದೆ ಡಂಗೂರ
m:-  ಜೀವನದಲ್ ಹೇಳ್ಬೀಳು  ಏನಾದ್ರೂ
ಬಂದ್ ಬುಡ್ಲಿ ಸಂಧಾಗಿ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ ಸಂಸಾರ
f.m:- ಶಾನೆ (ಭಾರಿ) ವೈನಾಗವ್ನೆ 
 ಜೀವಕ್ಕ ಜೊತೆಯಾಗವ್ನೆ
m:-  ಶಾನೇ (ಭಾರಿ)ವೈನಾಗವ್ಳೆ
 ಉಸಿರಲ್ ಬೆರೆತೊಗವ್ಳೆ
-----------
Song Credits :

♪ Singers : Sid Sriram and Prithwi Bhat
♪ Lyrics : Chethan Kumar

f.m :-  ಮಂಟೇ ಸಿದ್ದಪ್ಪಾಜಿ ಮಾದೇವ ನಾಣೆ
ಈ ಜೀವ  ಯಾವತ್ತಿಗೂ  ನಿಂದೇನೆ
m :- ಬಾರಿ ವೈನಾಗವ್ಳೆ 
ಕಿವಿಯಲ್  ಪಿಸ್ ಗೂಡ್ತಾಳೆ
f. m:-  ಬಾರಿ ವೈನಾಗವ್ನೆ
ಭಾರಿ ಗಮ್ಮಂತಾನೆ
BGM:- ಮಕ್ಕಳ ಕೋರಸ್
ಕಬ್ಬನ್ಗದ್ದೆ ,ರಾಗಿ ಸಾಲು ಬಾಳೆ ಮಂಡಿ ,ಆಲೆಮನೆ
ನಿಮ್ಮ ಜೋಡಿ ನೋಡೋದಕ್ಕೆ ಕಾಯ್ತ ಅವೇ
ಜೋಡಿ ಎತ್ತು, ಹಾಡು ಮೇಕೆ, ಕೋಳಿ ಹುಂಜ , ಹಕ್ಕಿಸಾಲು 
ನೂರು ಕಾಲ  ಬಾಳಿ ಅಂತ ಹೇಳ್ತಾ ಅವೇ

 ಚರಣ:-2
f.m :- ಗತ್ತು ದೊರೆಯಂಗೆ ಮಾತು ಮುತ್ತಂಗೆ
ಮತ್ತು ಏರಿದಂಗೆ ಎದೆಯಲ್ ಇಳಿದಂಗೆ
ಶಿವ ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
m :- ನಕ್ರೆ ಸಂಕ್ರಾಂತಿ  ಸಿಕ್ರೆ   ಉಗಾದಿ
 ನೋಟ ಪಟಾಕಿ  ಚಂದ ದಸರಾ ನೇ
 ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ  ಶಿವ ಶಿವ ಶಿವ
f.m :-  ಒಂಚೂರು ತಾಕುದ್ರು ಸಾಹುಕಾರ
ಎದೆ ಬಡಿತ ಆಯ್ತದೆ ಡಂಗೂರ
m:-  ಜೀವನದಲ್ ಹೇಳ್ಬೀಳು  ಏನಾದ್ರೂ
ಬಂದ್ ಬುಡ್ಲಿ ಸಂಧಾಗಿ ಮಾಡ್ತೀನಿ ಸಂಸಾರ
f.m:- ಶಾನೆ (ಭಾರಿ) ವೈನಾಗವ್ನೆ 
 ಜೀವಕ್ಕ ಜೊತೆಯಾಗವ್ನೆ
m:-  ಶಾನೇ (ಭಾರಿ)ವೈನಾಗವ್ಳೆ
 ಉಸಿರಲ್ ಬೆರೆತೊಗವ್ಳೆ
-----------

High Court 🔥 | Diler Kharkiya | Fiza Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Official Video | New Song

 #nasnaskyudukhei #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2026 

High Court 🔥 | Diler Kharkiya | Fiza Choudhary | New Haryanvi Song 2026 | Official Video



यह एक नया संगीत वीडियो है जिसमें एक महिला नाचती और गाती हुई दिखाई देती है। यह एक हिंदी song है जिसमें एक रोमांटिक Haryanvi song का अनुभव मिलता है। वीडियो में एक जोड़े को बातचीत करते हुए और अन्य लोगों को रंगीन पृष्ठभूमि में नाचते हुए देखा जा सकता है, जो इसे एक trending song बनाता है।

#newharyanvisong #haryanvisong #haryanvi #haryanvidance #haryanvidjsong #newharyanvisongsharyanavi2026 #newharyanvisong2026
#highcourt #highcourtsong #nasnaskyudukhei #newsong #foryou 
#highcourtkivakilmerifriendhogai #highcourtkivakilmerifanhogayi #djsong  #highcourtdjsong #highcourtnewsong #courtmeingoli #courtmeingolimarengemerijaan diler kharkiya new song,diler kharkiya song,diler kharkiya,80 lakh,80 lakh song,80 lakh new song,kunsa thara kaam chale,konsa thara kam chle

Song Credits :-

Song - High Court
Singer / Composer - Diler Kharkiya
Lyrics - Basant Mundi
Starring - Diler Kharkiya , Fiza Chaudhary
Music / Mix & Master - Jaizeey Music
Supervision & Keys - Sahil Raahi
Producer - Kehar Kharkiya
Video - Amit Bishnoi 
Dop - Vishal Godara
Blessing - Shri Rajender Singh ji Kharkiya
Reels Promotion - Sachin Chaudhary & Kehar Kharkiya ( GM Hood )
Online And Youtube Promotion - M Soni ( Sirsa )

LOVE !! LIKE !! COMMENTS !! SUBSCRIBE

Song Lyrics:
Kondsa thara kaam chale, jo saath me poora gaam chale

Shehar ke bacche fan thare, jab muh pe Ram ka naam chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Are poora circle yaaron ka, jisme bhai-bhai hoti hai

Sircode ve bande hai, jinse thari gel ladaai hoti hai
O duniya hori fan bawli, khoob badaai hoya kare

Dushman aape ban jaave, jab jaan chadhaai hoya kare
Are baaj chale, swaraj chale, re feto jinka khaaj chale

Vaidh badya badmasha ka, tu karta gel ilaaj chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale
Robin Hood si chhavi thari, manne suni saare gaama me

Thare theke se Dabwali me, aur site se Gurgaama me
Aa Panchkula aur Mahendragarh tak, kaam nahi se rukan ka

Dum rakhe se chhora tere, upar khokha fookan ka
Saaj chale, awaaz chale, kaala diggal ka raaj chale

Deep Laath tere gaane te, teri basai ne hota naaz chale
Aa jahaj chale aur byaaj chale, mhare gaama ka riwaaj chale

Saari bande gel bawli, 80 lakh ke jahaj chale

snippet.title: GTA 5 LIVE | Unlimited Fun & Epic Gameplay | PAJI IS LIVE
snippet.description:
Welcome to the ultimate GTA V live stream where we race fast cars, explore Los Santos, and vibe with chill gameplay. If you love high-speed races, smooth driving, and relaxed gaming streams, you’re in the right place. Join the live chat, suggest races, and enjoy nonstop GTA 5 fun with laid-back vibes. This stream is all about speed, style, and chilling with the community. Don’t forget to like, subscribe, and share the stream to support the channel and be part of the GTA V family.#gta6

snippet.title: Tere Paas Main|Main Vaapas Aaunga|@diljitdosanjh,@ARRahman,Imtiaz Ali,Irshad,Vedang,Sharvari,Deepali
snippet.description:
The unspoken promise of love. ❤️

Experience the heartfelt melody "Tere Paas Main" from the film Main Vaapas Aaunga. A soulful song that beautifully captures the emotions of love, longing, and the silent bond that keeps two hearts connected.

Stay updated with the latest videos from Tips Official, Subscribe on the below link.
http://youtube.com/tipsofficial

Song Composed, Produced, Arranged by A.R. Rahman
Lyrics by Irshad Kamil
Singer - Deepali Sahay
Mixed and Mastered by Nitish R Kumar
Music Supervisor & Editor - Hiral Viradia

Musicians:
Sarod - Rohan Prasanna
Tabla - Sai Shravanam
Flute - Naveen Kumar
Strings - Philharmonic Orchestra, Prague
Guitar - Shrey Gupta
Additional programming - Shubham Bhat, Marisakthi

Sound Engineers:
Panchathan Record Inn, Chennai
Senior engineers: Suresh Permal, Karthik Sekaran
Assisting engineers: Sathish V Saravanan, Bharath, Sarath Santhosh

Panchathan Record Inn, Mumbai
Senior engineer: Nitish R Kumar
Assisting engineer: Naval Chikhliya

Head of Technical Services: Riyasdeen Riyan
Dolby Atmos Music: Riyasdeen Riyan
Musician Coordinators: R Samidurai, Abdul Hayum

A Film by Imtiaz Ali

Starring: Diljit Dosanjh, Naseeruddin Shah, Vedang Raina, Sharvari
Music by: A. R. Rahman
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil

Written by Imtiaz Ali, Nayanika Mahtani

Publicity Design: (H-One) Rahul Nanda, Himanshu Nanda
Visual Effects: Phantom FX
Color: Redchillies.color
Visual Promotions: MA+TH
Digital Promotions: The Small Big Idea

CMO & Head of Syndication: Sameer Chopra
WSF Marketing: Nidhi Sethia, Dhruv Sinha, Gautam Ahuja, Anushka Arora, Virikkaa
Singhvi, Nibha Purawat
Applause Marketing: Devnidhi Bajoria, Apurva Patade, Leena Baidya, Tanvi Dedhia
Supervising Producer (Applause): Sneha Vashist
Co Producers: Sunil Chainani, Prasoon Garg
Executive Producers: Vishal Bajaj, Pratik Nandkumar More

Produced by Birla Studios & Applause Entertainment
Produced by Window Seat Films, Mohit Choudhary, Shibhasish Sarkar
Music on Tips Music Limited

Lyrics : 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaagaz Pe Koi Nazam Likhi Hai
Saanson Mein Likkhi/Rehti Nazam 
Jaise Paani Paas Pyaase
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Dil Ke Hain Dilaase
Tere Paas Main 
 
Jhooth Hain Ye Dooriyan
Jhooth Faasla Hai
Tujhe Roz Mil Raha Hun Main
Baat Ho Khayal Mein  
Jaise Honthon Mein Ho Laali
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Kaanon Mein Ho Baali
Tere Paas Main
 
Jaise Tu Hai Paas Mere
Tere Paas Main 
Jaise Shaamon Ke Sawere
Tere Paas Main
 
Apni Kahani Utni Rahegi
Chaahe Badha Lo Chaahe Ghata Lo
Kajal Nahin Main Gaalon Ka Til Hun
Mit Ta Nahin Main Kitna Mita Lo
Mera To Hatna Mushqil Bada Hai 
Tum Saamne Se Sheesha Hata Lo

snippet.title: JCB Innova Truck Vs Horror Zombie Tung Tung Sahur & Franklin In Indian Bike Driving 3d
snippet.description:
JCB Innova Truck Vs Horror Zombie Tung Tung Sahur & Franklin In Indian Bike Driving 3D

In this video, you will see an epic and terrifying fight where JCB Innova Truck fights against Horror Zombie Tung Tung Sahur and Franklin inside Indian Bike Driving 3D 😱🚛🧟🔥

This mod brings horror action, zombie attacks, dangerous monster encounters, and unexpected moments inside the game. Watch till the end for full entertainment, suspense, and madness 💥

Enjoy intense fights, scary scenes, fast driving, colorful locations, and full action gameplay 😎

👉 Video Highlights:

JCB Innova Truck vs Horror Zombie Tung Tung Sahur 🚛⚔️🧟🔥
Franklin Trapped in Horror Zombie Adventure 😱
Funny & Crazy Mod Moments 😂
Extreme Driving & Action Gameplay
Scary Zombie Monster Attacks 🔥
Epic Adventure in Indian Bike Driving 3D

snippet.title: Khush Rakhe Khuda Usko – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe
snippet.description:
Khush Rakhe Khuda Usko – Aarzoo Khaan | Emotional Hindi Sad Song | New Song 2026 | Arijit Singh Vibe


---



Khush rakhe khuda usko...
jise humne dil se chaha tha.

Chahe wo ab
hamara na raha ho...
par uski khushi ki dua
aaj bhi karte hain.

Mohabbat adhuri rahi...
magar duaayein kabhi adhuri nahi hoti.

Usne jo bhi faisla kiya...
humne kabool kar liya...
kyunki sachcha pyaar
haasil karne ka nahi...
khush dekhne ka naam hota hai.

“Khush Rakhe Khuda Usko”
ek aise dil ki kahani hai
jo toot kar bhi
baddua nahi deta.

Har sajde me
aaj bhi uska naam aata hai...
aur dil bas itna kehta hai —

khush rakhe khuda usko...
chahe mere bina hi sahi...

Is gaane mein
mohabbat bhi hai,
judai bhi hai,
aur ek gehra ehsaas bhi
jo har toote dil ko chhoo jaata hai.

Agar aapne bhi
kabhi kisi ko
apni rooh se zyada chaha ho
aur aaj bhi uski khushi ki dua karte ho,
to ye gaana
aapke dil ko chhoo jaayega.

🎙️ Voice: Aarzoo Khaan
🎧 Vibe: Emotional • Deep • Heartbreak • Soulful (Arijit Singh Vibe)

snippet.title: Rise Of Linga | Magudam (Tamil) | Vishal | GV Prakash | Anjali | Dushara | Super Good Films
snippet.description:
🔥 Presenting the Official Teaser of #Vishal35​ titled “MAGUDAM”, 

✨ Starring Vishal, Anjali, Dushara Vijayan, this film promises to be a powerful entertainer filled with action, drama, and emotions.  


Song Credits :
Music : G V Prakash Kumar
Singer : V7h, G V Prakash Kumar
Programmed by Ganesan S
Additional Programming : Smith Asher
Recorded by Hariharan Arulmurugan at Sounds Right Studios
Music Supervised by Jehovahson Alghar
Pre-Mixed by Roopash Tiwari 
Mixed and Mastered by Jehovahson Alghar, 
Divine labs 
Assistant Sound Engineer : Roopash Tiwari, Divine labs 
Divine labs Musicians Assistant : P Rajamurugan

🎬 Movie Credits:

Movie: MAGUDAM

Starring: Vishal, Anjali, Dushara Vijayan, John Vijay, Jeya prakash, Ajay, Vamsi Krishna, Abu Salim, Arjai, Vj Jhansi, Padam Kumar, Sabhumon

Screenplay & Direction: Vishal

Present : R.B Choudary

Production: Super good films

Producers : B.Suresh, R.B.Jeevan Choudary, Jithan Ramesh, Jiiva

Director of Photography: Richard.M. Nathan & Abinandhan Ramanujam

Music: G.V Prakash Kumar

Art Director : G. Durairaj

Action Director: Dhilip Subbarayan

Editor: N.B Srikanth

Dialogues: Pon Parthiban , Vishal , Anadh Kumaresan (Tamil) & Rajesh A Moorthy ( Telugu)

Story: Ravi Arasu

Lyrics: Ekadesi, Vivek, Uma devi, Karunakaran, V7H 

Costume Designer: Vasuki Bhaskar

Choreography: Brinda, Dinesh, Azar, Apsar

Production Executive: M.V Ramesh

Visual Effects Studio: Lorven studio

Sound Effects & Mix: T. Uday kumar (sound vibe studio)

DI: B2H studios 

Title Designer: Tuney Johan 
 
Publicity Designer: kannadasan DKD

Promo stills : Sudarshan 

Stills: Sai Santosh 

Pro: Riaz k Ahmed - Paras Riyaz (Tamil)

snippet.description:
Presenting brand new Bollywood song "Deewane Hain" from the highly anticipated movie Welcome to the Jungle. Sung by the incredible Amruta Fadnavis and Anand Raaj Anand, this track is set to recreate the nostalgic magic that audiences have loved for years!

Featuring a brilliant fusion of Kashmiri folk lyrics "Rakshida Rakshida," this high-energy track also features a massive star-studded cast that will surely blow your mind!

snippet.title: Franklin Saves Everyone From Giant Tsunami | Indian Bike Driving 3D
snippet.description:
Franklin Saves Everyone From Giant Tsunami | Indian Bike Driving 3D
Friends, a tsunami has hit *Indian Bike Driving 3D* today! 🌊😱

And Franklin is going to save everyone from this tsunami. There is an Iron Man suit placed on a ramp in the game; Franklin will use it to rescue the people and get them out of the city.

Will Franklin be able to save everyone?
Will he manage to reach the Iron Man suit?
And will everyone survive this dangerous tsunami?

This video is going to be a lot of fun, so make sure to watch it all the way through.

Don't forget to like and subscribe! ❤️
